pr.title: Record: Int6 mixed quant + MLP 3x + STE QAT + sliding window (val_bpb 1.1712)

output.summary: Combines per-row Int6 mixed quant with STE QAT, 3× MLP expansion, and sliding-window eval plus Muon tuning to fit 21.8M params.
techniques: Per-row Int6 mix with STE fake-quant QAT on attention/MLP weights
MLP hidden width tripled while quant/compression keeps 21.8M params under budget
Sliding-window stride-64 eval with seq_len 4096 context scoring
